item.title: Flutter基础学习——按钮009
item.description:
介绍与准备

VS Code :自定义代码片段

我们在vs code中先点击f1，然后 执行命令snippets， 会提示 选择不同语言的代码片段，我们选择dart.json文件。我们自定义的dart.json文件内容为.

{
	"StatelessWidget": {
	  "prefix": "sl",
	  "body": [
		"class ${1:WidgetName} extends StatelessWidget {",
		"\t@override",
		"\tWidget build(BuildContext context) {",
		"\t\treturn ${2:Container}();",
		"\t}",
		"}"
	  ],
	  "description": "StatelessWidget"
	},
	"StatefulWidget": {
	  "prefix": "sf",
	  "body": [
		"class ${1:WidgetName} extends StatefulWidget {",
		"\t@override",
		"\t_${1:WidgetName}State createState() => _${1:WidgetName}State();",
		"}\n",
		"class _${1:WidgetName}State extends State<${1:WidgetName}> {",
		"\t@override",
		"\tWidget build(BuildContext context) {",
		"\t\treturn ${2:Container}();",
		"\t}",
		"}"
	  ],
	  "description": "StatefulWidget"
	},
	"StatelessWidget with Scaffold": {
	  "prefix": "sls",
	  "body": [
		"class ${1:WidgetName} extends StatelessWidget {",
		"\t@override",
		"\tWidget build(BuildContext context) {",
		"\t\treturn ${Scaffold}(",
		"\t\t\tappBar: AppBar(",
		"\t\t\t\ttitle: Text('${1:WidgetName}'),",
		"\t\t\t\televation: 0.0,",
		"\t\t\t),${2}",
		"\t\t);",
		"\t}",
		"}"
	  ],
	  "description": "StatelessWidget with Scaffold"
	},  
	"StatefulWidget with Scaffold": {
	  "prefix": "sfs",
	  "body": [
		"class ${1:WidgetName} extends StatefulWidget {",
		"\t@override",
		"\t_${1:WidgetName}State createState() => _${1:WidgetName}State();",
		"}\n",
		"class _${1:WidgetName}State extends State<${1:WidgetName}> {",
		"\t@override",
		"\tWidget build(BuildContext context) {",
		"\t\treturn ${Scaffold}(",
		"\t\t\tappBar: AppBar(",
		"\t\t\t\ttitle: Text('${1:WidgetName}'),",
		"\t\t\t\televation: 0.0,",
		"\t\t\t),${2}",
		"\t\t);",
		"\t}",
		"}"
	  ],
	  "description": "StatefulWidget with Scaffold"
	},
	"InheritedWidget": {
	  "prefix": "ih",
	  "body": [
		"class ${1:WidgetName} extends InheritedWidget {",
		"\tfinal Widget child;",
		"\t${2}",
		"\t${1:WidgetName}({",
		"\t\tthis.child,",
		"\t\t${2}",
		"\t}) : super(child: child);\n",
		"\tstatic ${1:WidgetName} of(BuildContext context) =>",
		"\t\t\tcontext.inheritFromWidgetOfExactType(${1:WidgetName});\n",
		"\t@override",
		"\tbool updateShouldNotify(${1:WidgetName} oldWidget) {",
		"\t\treturn true;",
		"\t}",
		"}"
	  ],
	  "description": "InheritedWidget"
	},
	"setState": {
	  "prefix": "ss",
	  "body": [
		"setState(() {${1}});",
	  ],
	  "description": "setState"
	},
	"build": {
	  "prefix": "build",
	  "body": [
		"@override",
		"Widget build(BuildContext context) {",
		"\treturn ${1:Container}(${2});",
		"}",
	  ],
	  "description": "Build Method"
	},
  }

准备Material Components演示页面

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class MaterialComponents extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('MaterialComponents'),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
      body: ListView(
        children: <Widget>[
          ListItem(title: 'FloatingActionButton',
          page: FloatingActionButtonDemo(),),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class FloatingActionButtonDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('FloatingActionButtonDemo'),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
    );
  }
}

class ListItem extends StatelessWidget {
  final String title;
  final Widget page;

  ListItem({this.title, this.page});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return ListTile(
      title: Text(title),
      onTap: () {
        Navigator.of(context)
            .push(MaterialPageRoute(builder: (context) => page));
      },
    );
  }
}

漂浮按钮

FloatingActionButton：漂浮动作按钮

class FloatingActionButtonDemo extends StatelessWidget {

  final Widget _floatingActionButton = new FloatingActionButton(
    onPressed: (){},
    child: Icon(Icons.add), 
    elevation: 0.0,//阴影效果，控制的和下一层的高度 ，这里设置0表示和下一层贴合到一块
    backgroundColor: Colors.black87,//默认按钮的颜色是在主题里面设置的
    shape: BeveledRectangleBorder(
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10.0)//斜角矩形按钮，设置成30就是菱形
    ),//按钮形状
  );

  final Widget _floatingActionButtonExtend = new FloatingActionButton.extended(
    //可以添加标签文字
    onPressed: (){},
    icon: Icon(Icons.add),
    label: Text('Add'),
  );


  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('FloatingActionButtonDemo'),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
      // floatingActionButton: _floatingActionButton,
      floatingActionButton: _floatingActionButtonExtend,
    );
  }
}

BottomAppBar：底部工具栏

@override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('FloatingActionButtonDemo'),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
      floatingActionButton: _floatingActionButton,
      // floatingActionButton: _floatingActionButtonExtend,
      floatingActionButtonLocation: FloatingActionButtonLocation.centerDocked,//用来调整漂浮按钮的位置
      bottomNavigationBar: BottomAppBar(//底部工具栏
        child: Container(
          height: 80.0,
        ),
        shape: CircularNotchedRectangle(),//切除一个和按钮形状相符的缺口
      ),

    );
  }

按钮

创建演示小部件用的页面

class ButtonDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('ButtonDemo'),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
      body: Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(15.0),
        child: Column(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: <Widget>[
            Row(
              mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
              children: <Widget>[
                
              ],
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

FlatButton：文字按钮

class ButtonDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final Widget flatButtonDemo = Row(
      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
      children: <Widget>[
        FlatButton(
          child: Text('Button'),
          // onPressed: null,)//onPressed :null时 页面显示按钮禁止状态
          onPressed: () {},
          splashColor: Colors.grey, //溅墨效果
          textColor: Theme.of(context).accentColor, //按钮文字颜色
        ),
        FlatButton.icon(
          icon: Icon(Icons.add),
          // onPressed: null,)//onPressed :null时 页面显示按钮禁止状态
          onPressed: () {},
          splashColor: Colors.grey, //溅墨效果
          textColor: Theme.of(context).accentColor, //按钮文字颜色
        ),
      ],
    );

    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('ButtonDemo'),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
      body: Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(15.0),
        child: Column(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: <Widget>[
            flatButtonDemo,
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

RaisedButton：按钮

按钮主题：颜色、形状

OutlineButton：描边按钮

outlinebutton 有一个描边效果。

按钮容器Container：有固定宽度的按钮

按钮容器Expanded：沾满可用宽度的按钮

按钮容器ButtonBar：一组带边距的横排显示按钮

整理：把演示放在单独的文件里

弹出菜单

准备PopupMenuButtonDemo

PopupMenuButton：弹出式菜单按钮

item.title: Flutter基础学习——表单008
item.description:
介绍与准备

创建FormDemo小部件

我们将创建单独的form_demo.dart文件来演示实例。而在主程序中，我们做了以下修改。

class App extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MaterialApp(
      debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false, //去掉右上角debug显示标志
      // home: Home(),
      initialRoute: '/form',//如果不设置 home属性，routes里面一定要有 '/'的映射，否则会报错。
      // home: SliverDemo(),
      // home: NavigatorDemo(),
      routes: {//这里面是map，key是路由名字，value是打开路由要显示的东西，也就是要显示的小部件所使用的build方法(Widget builder)
        '/':(context) =>Home(),
        '/about':(context) => Page(title: 'About',),
        '/form':(context) => FormDemo(),
      },
      theme: ThemeData(
          primarySwatch: Colors.deepPurple, //主题颜色
          highlightColor: Color.fromRGBO(255, 255, 255, 0.5), //高亮颜色,点击按钮立即显示的颜色
          splashColor: Colors.white70, //水波纹颜色
          accentColor: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
          ),
    );
  }
}

Theme：定制、使用、重置、覆盖主题

在子页面中，默认使用父程序中的主题，但是我们可以自定义覆盖，重置主题：

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class FormDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      body: Theme(
        // data: ThemeData(//这里可以完全替代之前的主题
        //   primaryColor: Colors.black
        // ),
        data: Theme.of(context).copyWith(//这里可以覆盖某些特定的设置
          primaryColor: Colors.black//这样下来，除了主题颜色之外，其他的都会保留
        ),
        child: ThemeDemo(),
      ),
    );
  }
}

class ThemeDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      // color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,
      color: Theme.of(context).accentColor,
    );
  }
}

文本字段

TextField：文本字段

TextField：文本字段样式（InputDecoration）

TextField：监视文本字段的值的变化与提交

TextField：使用TextEditingController监听文本字段变化

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class FormDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      body: Theme(
        // data: ThemeData(//这里可以完全替代之前的主题
        //   primaryColor: Colors.black
        // ),
        data: Theme.of(context).copyWith(//这里可以覆盖某些特定的设置
          primaryColor: Colors.black//这样下来，除了主题颜色之外，其他的都会保留
        ),
        child: Container(
          padding: EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
          child: Column(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
            children: <Widget>[
              TextFieldDemo(),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}


class TextFieldDemo extends StatefulWidget {
  final Widget child;

  TextFieldDemo({Key key, this.child}) : super(key: key);

  _TextFieldDemoState createState() => _TextFieldDemoState();
}

class _TextFieldDemoState extends State<TextFieldDemo> {

  final textEditingController = TextEditingController();

  @override
  void dispose() {
    // TODO: implement dispose
    textEditingController.dispose();
    super.dispose();
  }

  @override
  void initState() {
    // TODO: implement initState
    super.initState();
    textEditingController.text='ee';
    textEditingController.addListener((){
      debugPrint('input: ${textEditingController.text}');
    });
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return TextField(
      controller: textEditingController,
      // onChanged: (value){
      //   debugPrint('input:$value');
      // },
      // onSubmitted: (value){
      //   debugPrint('input:$value');
      // },
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        icon: Icon(Icons.subject),
        labelText: 'Title',
        hintText: 'Enter the post title',
        // border: InputBorder.none,//去除底部文本框
        // border: OutlineInputBorder()//把input给框起来
        filled: true,//带背景颜色的文本框
        // fillColor: Colors.red //设置北京颜色
      ),
    );
  }
}


class ThemeDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      // color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,
      color: Theme.of(context).accentColor,
    );
  }
}

表单

Form：表单

在form里面，我们可以包装一组FormField，以下我们演示一个最简单的注册示例

class RegisterForm extends StatelessWidget {
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Form(
      child: Column(
        children: <Widget>[
          TextFormField(
            //相当于在FormField里面包装了一个TextField
            decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'UserName'),
          ),
          TextFormField(
            obscureText: true,
            decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'passowrd'),
          ),
          SizedBox(
            height: 32.0,
          ),
          Container(
            width: double.infinity,
            child: RaisedButton(
              color: Theme.of(context).accentColor,
              child: Text(
                'Register',
                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
              ),
              elevation: 0.0,
              onPressed: (){

              },
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

Form：保存与获取表单里的数据

我们可以先给表单添加一个GlobalKey，然后把key交给表单，最后我们可以使用这个key来引用表单， 以此来获取表单里面输入的内容。这里的小部件我们要用 🈶️状态的小部件（以后会讲）StatefuleWidget,要不然程序会崩溃。

class RegisterForm extends StatefulWidget {

  _RegisterFormState createState() => _RegisterFormState();
}

class _RegisterFormState extends State<RegisterForm> {

  final registerFormKey =GlobalKey<FormState>();
  String username,password;

  void submitRegisterForm(){
    registerFormKey.currentState.save();
    debugPrint('username:$username');
    debugPrint('password:$password');
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Form(
      key: registerFormKey,
      child: Column(
        children: <Widget>[
          TextFormField(
            //相当于在FormField里面包装了一个TextField
            decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'UserName'),
            onSaved: (value){
              username = value;
            },
          ),
          TextFormField(
            obscureText: true,
            decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'passowrd'),
            onSaved: (value){
              password = value;
            },
          ),
          SizedBox(
            height: 32.0,
          ),
          Container(
            width: double.infinity,
            child: RaisedButton(
              color: Theme.of(context).accentColor,
              child: Text(
                'Register',
                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
              ),
              elevation: 0.0,
              onPressed: submitRegisterForm,
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

Form：验证表单里的数据

验证表单写法风格和上面获取表单信息类似

class RegisterForm extends StatefulWidget {

  _RegisterFormState createState() => _RegisterFormState();
}

class _RegisterFormState extends State<RegisterForm> {

  final registerFormKey =GlobalKey<FormState>();
  String username,password;

  void submitRegisterForm(){
    registerFormKey.currentState.save();
    registerFormKey.currentState.validate();
    debugPrint(' username:$username');
    debugPrint('password:$password');
  }

  String validateUsername(value){
    if(value.isEmpty){
      return 'username is required.';
    }
    return null;
  }
  String validatePassword(value){
    if(value.isEmpty){
      return 'password is required';
    }
    return null;
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Form(
      key: registerFormKey,
      child: Column(
        children: <Widget>[
          TextFormField(
            //相当于在FormField里面包装了一个TextField
            decoration: InputDecoration(
              labelText: 'UserName',
              helperText: ''),
            onSaved: (value){
              username = value;
            },
            validator: validateUsername,
            
          ),
          TextFormField(
            obscureText: true,
            decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'passowrd'),
            onSaved: (value){
              password = value;
            },
            validator: validatePassword,
          ),
          SizedBox(
            height: 32.0,
          ),
          Container(
            width: double.infinity,
            child: RaisedButton(
              color: Theme.of(context).accentColor,
              child: Text(
                'Register',
                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
              ),
              elevation: 0.0,
              onPressed: submitRegisterForm,
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

Form：自动验证

自动验证功能也和上面风格类似，我们可以只允许其验证失败的时候再打开验证功能。这样下来就能防止刚进入登录页面的时候就验证。

class RegisterForm extends StatefulWidget {

  _RegisterFormState createState() => _RegisterFormState();
}

class _RegisterFormState extends State<RegisterForm> {

  final registerFormKey =GlobalKey<FormState>();
  String username,password;
  bool autovalidate =false;//自动验证功能默认关闭

  void submitRegisterForm(){
    if(registerFormKey.currentState.validate()){
      registerFormKey.currentState.save();
      debugPrint(' username:$username');
      debugPrint('password:$password');
    }else{
      autovalidate =true;
    }

    
  }

  String validateUsername(value){
    if(value.isEmpty){
      return 'username is required.';
    }
    return null;//表示验证成功
  }
  String validatePassword(value){
    if(value.isEmpty){
      return 'password is required';
    }
    return null;
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Form(
      key: registerFormKey,
      child: Column(
        children: <Widget>[
          TextFormField(
            //相当于在FormField里面包装了一个TextField
            decoration: InputDecoration(
              labelText: 'UserName',
              helperText: ''),
            onSaved: (value){
              username = value;
            },
            validator: validateUsername,
            autovalidate: autovalidate,
          ),
          TextFormField(
            obscureText: true,
            decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'passowrd'),
            onSaved: (value){
              password = value;
            },
            validator: validatePassword,
            autovalidate: autovalidate,
          ),
          SizedBox(
            height: 32.0,
          ),
          Container(
            width: double.infinity,
            child: RaisedButton(
              color: Theme.of(context).accentColor,
              child: Text(
                'Register',
                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
              ),
              elevation: 0.0,
              onPressed: submitRegisterForm,
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

SnackBar：在屏幕底部动画弹出提示栏

表单验证成功的时候，会请求后台，我们可以在这时候添加提示信息，部分代码如下

  void submitRegisterForm(){
    if(registerFormKey.currentState.validate()){
      registerFormKey.currentState.save();
      debugPrint(' username:$username');
      debugPrint('password:$password');

      Scaffold.of(context).showSnackBar(
        SnackBar(
          content: Text('Registering ...'),
        )
      );
    }else{
      autovalidate =true;
    } 
  }

item.title: Flutter基础学习——路由007
item.description:
介绍

VS Code：Flutter 代码片段

我们可以在vs code上安装代码片段插件，Awesome Flutter Snippets，以便我们可是使用缩写方式快速建立 代码片段。

路由

一堆路由

在flutter里面展示内容的屏幕或页面叫Route（路由），Navigator这个小部件提供了方法可以管理这些路由，比如Navigator.push 和Navigator.pop，路由对象会放在一个堆Stack里面，先进后出，我们可以自己创建一个Navigator来处理路由堆，也开始使用WidgetsApp或MaterialApp小部件给我创建好的，一般引用给我们创建好的Navigator，可是去使用Navigator.off这个方法，把Context交给它就可以了，这样我们就可以把新的路由push到这个路由堆的上面，或者是pop掉路由堆上的路由。

打开新页面并返回（push与pop）：准备

打开新页面并返回（push与pop）：实施

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class NavigatorDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      body: Center(
        child: Row(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: <Widget>[
            FlatButton(
              child: Text('Home'),
              onPressed: null,
            ),
            FlatButton(
              child: Text('About'),
              onPressed: () {
                Navigator.of(context).push(
                  //push 会将这个新的路由push到路由堆里面
                  MaterialPageRoute(
                      builder: (BuildContext context) => Page(
                            title: 'About',
                          )),
                );
              },
            )
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

class Page extends StatelessWidget {
  final String title;
  Page({this.title});
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text(title),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
      floatingActionButton: FloatingActionButton(
        child: Icon(Icons.arrow_back),
        onPressed: (){
          Navigator.pop(context);//返回到上一个路由页面上
        },
      ),
    );
  }
}

带名字的路由（Navigator.pushNamed）

在MaterialApp小部件里面，我们可以使用routes属性去实现定义好带名字的路由，然后想在push他们的时候使用Navigator.pushNamed的这个方法去把这个名字交给他就可以了。

初始路由：initialRoute

class App extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MaterialApp(
      debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false, //去掉右上角debug显示标志
      // home: Home(),
      // home: SliverDemo(),
      home: NavigatorDemo(),
      routes: {//这里面是map，key是路由名字，value是打开路由要显示的东西，也就是要显示的小部件所使用的build方法(Widget builder)
        '/about':(context) => Page(title: 'About',)
      },
      theme: ThemeData(
          primarySwatch: Colors.deepPurple, //主题颜色
          highlightColor: Color.fromRGBO(255, 255, 255, 0.5), //高亮颜色,点击按钮立即显示的颜色
          splashColor: Colors.white70 //水波纹颜色
          ),
    );
  }
}

NavigatorDemo中关于按钮 about的写法是

            FlatButton(
              child: Text('About'),
              onPressed: () {
                // Navigator.of(context).push(
                //   //push 会将这个新的路由push到路由堆里面
                //   MaterialPageRoute(
                //       builder: (BuildContext context) => Page(
                //             title: 'About',
                //           )),
                // );
                Navigator.pushNamed(context, '/about');
              },
            )

详情页

InkWell：添加溅墨动画效果

我们现在拿ListViewDemo来改造，让用户点击下拉列表的每一项时，都会出现溅墨效果。

在内容详情页上显示内容

ListViewDemo最终修改如下

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import '../model/post.dart';
import './post_show.dart';

class ListViewDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  Widget _listItemBuilder(BuildContext context, int index) {
    return Container(
      color: Colors.white,
      margin: EdgeInsets.all(8.0),
      child: Stack(
        children: <Widget>[
          Column(
            children: <Widget>[
              AspectRatio(
                aspectRatio: 16 / 9,
                child: Image.network(
                  posts[index].imageUrl,
                  fit: BoxFit.cover,
                ),
              ),
              SizedBox(
                height: 16.0,
              ),
              Text(
                posts[index].title,
                style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.title,
              ),
              Text(
                posts[index].author,
                style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.subhead,
              ),
              SizedBox(
                height: 16.0,
              )
            ],
          ),
          Positioned.fill(
            child: Material(
              color: Colors.transparent, //背景颜色透明
              child: InkWell(
                //这会给我们一块带溅墨效果的区域
                splashColor:
                    Colors.white.withOpacity(0.3), //溅墨的颜色为白色，并设置不透明度,慢慢散开的颜色
                highlightColor: Colors.red.withOpacity(0.1), //高亮颜色，最开始显示高亮颜色
                onTap: () {
                  debugPrint('tap');
                  Navigator.of(context).push(MaterialPageRoute(
                      builder: (BuildContext context) => PostShow(post:posts[index])));
                },
              ),
            ),
          )
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: implement build
    return ListView.builder(
      itemCount: posts.length,
      itemBuilder: _listItemBuilder,
    );
  }
}

我们会使用post_show.dart来显示详情

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import '../model/post.dart';

class PostShow extends StatelessWidget {
  final Post post;

  PostShow({@required this.post});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('${post.title}'),
        elevation: 0.0,
      ),
      body: Column(
        children: <Widget>[
          Image.network(post.imageUrl),
          Container(
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(32.0),
            width: double.infinity,
            child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: <Widget>[
                Text(
                  '${post.title}',
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.title,
                ),
                Text(
                  '${post.author}',
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.subhead,
                ),
                SizedBox(
                  height: 32.0,
                ),
                Text(
                  '${post.description}',
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.body1,
                ),
              ],
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

item.title: Flutter基础学习——Sliver 006
item.description:
介绍

创建SliverDemo小部件

新建一个dart文件，命名为sliver_demo.dart

在main.dart中，我们先将home:Home()替换成home:SliverDemo()

Slivers

Slivers

Sliver 英文是裂片，条子，口子的意思，从一大块里面切开或裂开一个口子，这个大块指的就是我们应用界面上的ViewPort（可视口），就是显示东西的地方，sliver在这里就是一小块可视口的意思，或者叫可视口的一小块。一般我们会把一些sliver小部件放在CustomScrollView 的slivers属性里面。

我们会在这个slivers 里面放置一些sliver类型的小部件，比如：SliverList，SliverFixedExtentList，SliverGrid，

SliverPadding，SliverAppBar，ScrollNotification，IndexedSemantics。我们可以从CustomScrollView类注释中看到如上描述 。

SliverGrid：网格视图

SliverGrid和之前的GridView类似，一个GridView相当于一个CustomScrollView的sliver属性里面加了一个SliverGrid，如果觉得GridView不能满足需求，可以用一下SliverGrid。查看SliverGrid类定义，我们可以看到它也有count和extent两种方式，构建SliverGrid我们需要提供两个参数，gridDelegate和delegate，前者用来构建网格视图相关的东西，后者主要是构建网格视图里面的项目用的。

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import '../model/post.dart';

class SliverDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      body: CustomScrollView(
        slivers: <Widget>[
          SliverGrid(
            gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
                //主要是可以设置交叉轴上的网格数量
                crossAxisCount: 2,
                crossAxisSpacing: 8.0,
                mainAxisSpacing: 8.0,
                childAspectRatio: 1.0,//显示比例
                ),
            delegate: SliverChildBuilderDelegate(
              (BuildContext context, int index) {
                return Container(
                  child:
                      Image.network(posts[index].imageUrl, fit: BoxFit.cover),
                );
              },
              childCount: posts.length, //网格视图项目数量),
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

SliverPadding（内边距）与 SliverSafeArea（安全区）

SliverGrid没有padding属性，想要添加内边距，需要去用一个SliverPadding 的小部件。安全区值指的是苹果10以上抬头不能显示全部，只能显示时间，电量，信号，下面显示全部的地方才叫做安全区。

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import '../model/post.dart';

class SliverDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      body: CustomScrollView(
        slivers: <Widget>[
          // SliverPadding(
          //   padding: EdgeInsets.all(8.0),
          //   sliver: SliverGridDemo(),
          // ),
          SliverSafeArea(//这样就放在了苹果安全区内
            sliver: SliverPadding(
              padding: EdgeInsets.all(8.0),
              sliver: SliverGridDemo(),
            ),
          )
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class SliverGridDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return SliverGrid(
      gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
        //主要是可以设置交叉轴上的网格数量
        crossAxisCount: 2,
        crossAxisSpacing: 8.0,
        mainAxisSpacing: 8.0,
        childAspectRatio: 1.0, //显示比例
      ),
      delegate: SliverChildBuilderDelegate(
        (BuildContext context, int index) {
          return Container(
            child: Image.network(posts[index].imageUrl, fit: BoxFit.cover),
          );
        },
        childCount: posts.length, //网格视图项目数量),
      ),
    );
  }
}

SliverList：列表视图

我们将上面的SliverGridDemo()替换成SliverListDemo()

class SliverListDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return SliverList(
      delegate: SliverChildBuilderDelegate(
        (BuildContext context, int index) {
          return Padding(
            padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 32.0),
            child: Material(
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12.0), //圆角效果
              elevation: 14.0, //阴影效果
              shadowColor: Colors.grey.withOpacity(0.5), //阴影颜色
              child: Stack(
                children: <Widget>[
                  AspectRatio(
                    //设置特定比例
                    aspectRatio: 16 / 9, //设置比例
                    child:
                        Image.network(posts[index].imageUrl, fit: BoxFit.cover),
                  ),
                  Positioned(
                    top: 32.0,
                    left: 32.0,
                    child: Column(
                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                      children: <Widget>[
                        Text(
                          posts[index].title,
                          style: TextStyle(fontSize: 20.0, color: Colors.white),
                        ),
                        Text(
                          posts[index].author,
                          style: TextStyle(fontSize: 13.0, color: Colors.white),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  )
                ],
              ),
            ),
          );
        },
        childCount: posts.length, //网格视图项目数量),
      ),
    );
  }
}

SliverAppBar：应用工具栏

SliverAppBar(
            title: Text('CrazyAndy'),
            // pinned: true,//固定住顶部栏，默认为false
            floating: true,//顶部栏滚动渐进效果，默认为false
          ),
          SliverSafeArea(
            //这样就放在了苹果安全区内
            sliver: SliverPadding(
              padding: EdgeInsets.all(8.0),
              // sliver: SliverGridDemo(),
              sliver: SliverListDemo(),
            ),
          )

带渐进动画的可伸缩空间

SliverAppBar(
            title: Text('CrazyAndy'),
            // pinned: true,//固定住顶部栏，默认为false
            floating: true, //顶部栏滚动渐进效果，默认为false
            expandedHeight: 178.0, //设置伸展高度
            flexibleSpace: FlexibleSpaceBar(
              //弹性空间
              title: Text(
                'How Are You'.toLowerCase(),
                style: TextStyle(
                  fontSize: 15.0,
                  letterSpacing: 3.0,
                  fontWeight: FontWeight.w400,
                ),
              ),
              background: Image.network(
                  'http://b.hiphotos.baidu.com/image/h%3D300/sign=c8a9d4e2841363270aedc433a18fa056/11385343fbf2b2114a65cd70c48065380cd78e41.jpg',
                  fit: BoxFit.cover),
            ),
          ),

item.title: Flutter基础学习——视图005
item.description:
介绍

单独创建demo/view_demo.dart文件，并在main.dart文件中加入对 该标签的配置

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'demo/draw_demo.dart';
import 'demo/bottom_navigation_bar_demo.dart';
import 'demo/basic_demo.dart';
import 'demo/ListView_demo.dart';
import 'demo/LayoutDemo.dart';
import 'demo/view_demo.dart';


void main() => runApp(App());

class App extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MaterialApp(
      debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false, //去掉右上角debug显示标志
      home: Home(),
      theme: ThemeData(
        primarySwatch: Colors.deepPurple,//主题颜色
        highlightColor: Color.fromRGBO(255, 255, 255, 0.5),//高亮颜色,点击按钮立即显示的颜色
        splashColor: Colors.white70//水波纹颜色
      ),
      
    );
  }
}

class Home extends StatelessWidget {
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return DefaultTabController(
      length: 4,//设置标签数量
      child: Scaffold(
        backgroundColor: Colors.grey[100],
        appBar: AppBar(
          // leading: IconButton(//图标按钮
          //   icon: Icon(Icons.menu),//图标
          //   tooltip: 'Navigation',
          //   onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Navigation button is pressed'),
          // ),
          title: Text('CrazyAndy'),
          actions: <Widget>[
            IconButton(//图标按钮
              icon: Icon(Icons.search),//图标
              tooltip: 'Search',
              onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Search button is pressed'),
            )
          ],
          elevation: 30.0,
          bottom: TabBar(//我们可以在appbar的底部设置tabbar
            unselectedLabelColor: Colors.black38,//设置为选中标签栏颜色
            indicatorColor: Colors.black54,//设置当前激活标签栏底部的指示器显示线
            indicatorSize: TabBarIndicatorSize.label,//指示器显示线的长度和label一致
            indicatorWeight: 1.0,
            tabs: <Widget>[
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.local_florist),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.change_history),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.directions_bike),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.view_quilt),)
            ],
          ),
        ),
        body: TabBarView(
          children: <Widget>[
            ListViewDemo(),
            BasicDemo(),
            LayoutDemo(),
            ViewDemo()
          ],
        ),
        // drawer: Text('this is drawer'),//左边显示,如果右边显示则用endDrawer
        drawer: DrawDemo(),
        bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBarDemo(),
      ),
    );
  }
}

页面视图

PageView：页面视图

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class ViewDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return PageView(
      children: <Widget>[
        Container(
          color: Colors.brown[900],
          alignment: Alignment(0, 0),
          child: Text('ONE',
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 32.0, color: Colors.white)),
        ),
        Container(
          color: Colors.grey[900],
          alignment: Alignment(0, 0),
          child: Text('TWO',
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 32.0, color: Colors.white)),
        ),
        Container(
          color: Colors.blueGrey[900],
          alignment: Alignment(0, 0),
          child: Text('THREE',
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 32.0, color: Colors.white)),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }
}

PageView：页面视图的属性

1，按住屏幕然后左右拖动，如果不到一半的话，就会缩回去，否则翻过去，这个效果叫pageSnapping，默认是true；

2，属性reverse 表示倒置;

3，scrollDirection 滚动方向，默认是横向;

4，滚动回调，onPageChanged 接受 变化后页面的索引值作为参数，索引值从0开始

PageView：用PageController调整页面的显示

PageController是控制pageview小部件显示页面的对象

class ViewDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return PageView(
      // pageSnapping: false,//滚动效果设置
      // reverse: true,//排序默认正向
      scrollDirection: Axis.vertical,//方向
      onPageChanged: (currentPage) => debugPrint('Page:$currentPage'),
      controller: PageController(
        initialPage: 1,//默认当前显示值
        keepPage: false,//默认pageview会记住用户滚动到哪个页面
        viewportFraction: 0.65,//页面占用可视口比例,默认是1
      ),
      children: <Widget>[
        Container(
          color: Colors.brown[900],
          alignment: Alignment(0, 0),
          child: Text('ONE',
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 32.0, color: Colors.white)),
        ),
        Container(
          color: Colors.grey[900],
          alignment: Alignment(0, 0),
          child: Text('TWO',
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 32.0, color: Colors.white)),
        ),
        Container(
          color: Colors.blueGrey[900],
          alignment: Alignment(0, 0),
          child: Text('THREE',
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 32.0, color: Colors.white)),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }
}

PageView.builder按需生成页面

class ViewDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  Widget _pageItemBuilder(BuildContext context, int index) {
    return Stack(
      children: <Widget>[
        SizedBox.expand(
          //expand会占满整个空间
          child: Image.network(
            posts[index].imageUrl,
            fit: BoxFit.cover,
          ),
        ),
        Positioned(
          bottom: 8.0,
          left: 8.0,
          child: Column(
            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
            children: <Widget>[
              Text(
                posts[index].title,
                style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),
              ),
              Text(posts[index].author)
            ],
          ),
        )
      ],
    );
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return PageView.builder(
      itemCount: posts.length,
      itemBuilder: _pageItemBuilder,
    );
  }
}

网格视图

GridView：网格视图(GridView.count)

class ViewDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  List<Widget> _buildTiles(int length) {
    return List.generate(length, (int index) {
      return Container(
        color: Colors.grey[300],
        alignment: Alignment(0.0, 0.0),
        child:
            Text('Item $index', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 18.0, color: Colors.grey)),
      );
    });
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return GridView.count(
      crossAxisCount: 3, //交叉轴显示的数量
      crossAxisSpacing: 16.0, //交叉轴方向边距
      mainAxisSpacing: 16.0, //主轴方向边距
      scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,//滚动方向，默认为纵向
      children: _buildTiles(100),
    );
  }
}

GridView.extent

GridView.extent和GridView.count差不多，唯一的区别就是extent是你需要自定义交叉轴方向的单个title的尺寸，而count是根据你count值进行交叉轴方向 布局的分配。

GridView.builder按需生成视图项目

class GridViewBuilderDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  
  Widget _gridItemBuilder(BuildContext context,int index){
    return Container(
      child: Container(
        child: Image.network(
          posts[index].imageUrl,
          fit:BoxFit.cover
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return GridView.builder(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(8.0),
      itemCount: posts.length,
      itemBuilder: _gridItemBuilder,
      gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
        crossAxisCount: 3,
        crossAxisSpacing: 8.0,
        mainAxisSpacing: 8.0
      ),
    );
  }
}

item.title: Flutter基础学习——布局004
item.description:
准备

创建LayoutDemo小部件

创建可配置的图标徽章(IconBadge)小部件

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';


class LayoutDemo extends StatelessWidget {

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Column(
      children: <Widget>[
        IconBadge(Icons.pool,size: 64,),
      ],
    );
  }
  
}

class IconBadge extends StatelessWidget {

  final IconData icon;
  final double size;

  IconBadge(this.icon,{this.size=32.0});
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Icon(icon,size:size,color:Colors.white),
      width: size + 60,
      height: size + 60,
      color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
    );
  }

}

布局

Row(横排)与Column(竖排)

row为横着排，column 是竖着排，借用bootstrap css样式中 flexable 布局概念。

mainAxis：主轴

Row 的主轴是横着的，Column主轴是竖着的。

mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.start

return Container(
      child: Column(
        // mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.start,//从主轴开始往后排
        // mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.end,//从主轴结束往前排
        // mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,//主轴中间
        // mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceAround,//将主轴剩下空间分配到小部件的周围
        // mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,//将主轴剩下空间分配到小部件之间
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceEvenly, //将主轴剩下的空间平均分配到小部件之间
        children: <Widget>[
          IconBadge(
            Icons.pool,
            size: 64,
          ),
          IconBadge(
            Icons.beach_access,
            size: 64,
          ),
          IconBadge(
            Icons.airplanemode_active,
            size: 64,
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );

crossAxis：交叉轴

crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start

交叉轴即为主轴的垂直轴，比方说 Row的小部件中，主轴是 横轴，那么交叉轴就是竖zhou

SizedBox：固定尺寸的盒子

SizeBox我们可以用来包裹 widget，然后用sizebox的宽高来定义区域块的宽高，相当于在widget外的container 定义 padding；当然可以使用一个只有高度或宽度的 SizeBox来隔开两个小部件。

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class LayoutDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: <Widget>[
          SizedBox(
            width: 200.0,
            height: 300.0,
            child: Container(
              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8.0),
              ),
              child: Icon(
                Icons.ac_unit,color:Colors.white,size:32.0
              ),
            ),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 32.0,),
          SizedBox(
            width: 100.0,
            height: 100.0,
            child: Container(
              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8.0),
              ),
              child: Icon(
                Icons.brightness_2,color:Colors.white,size:32.0
              ),
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class IconBadge extends StatelessWidget {
  final IconData icon;
  final double size;

  IconBadge(this.icon, {this.size = 32.0});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Icon(icon, size: size, color: Colors.white),
      width: size + 60,
      height: size + 60,
      color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
    );
  }
}

Alignment：对齐

Container 有个属性是 alignment: Alignment(0, 1.0),我们可以根据这个设置子部件在container中的百分比位置，

Alignment（x,y） 两个参数代表 横竖方向的比例，如果-1<x<0,那么部件应该在横向的左半部某个位置。

Stack：一摞小部件

statck会将子部件都叠加到一块，也可在stack的子部件添加 Positioned小部件(包含left, right,top,bottom属性,相对于父部件内部位置)

AspectRatio：宽高比

设置子部件宽高 比例

ConstrainedBox：带限制的盒子

ConstrainedBox 可是设置最小 最大 宽高

本章所有代码整理如下：

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class LayoutDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: <Widget>[
          Stack(
            alignment: Alignment.topLeft,
            children: <Widget>[
              SizedBox(
                width: 200.0,
                height: 300.0,
                child: Container(
                  alignment: Alignment(0, 1.0),
                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
                    color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8.0),
                  ),
                  child: Icon(Icons.ac_unit, color: Colors.white, size: 32.0),
                ),
              ),
              SizedBox(
                height: 32.0,
              ),
              SizedBox(
                width: 100.0,
                height: 100.0,
                child: Container(
                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
                      color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
                      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8.0),
                      gradient: RadialGradient(colors: [
                        Color.fromRGBO(7, 102, 255, 1.0),
                        Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
                      ])),
                  child:
                      Icon(Icons.brightness_2, color: Colors.white, size: 32.0),
                ),
              ),
              Positioned(
                right: 20.0,
                child: Icon(Icons.ac_unit, color: Colors.white, size: 32.0),
              )
            ],
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class AspectRatioDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: <Widget>[
          AspectRatio(
            aspectRatio: 16/9,
            child: Container(
              color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
            ),
          )
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class ConstraintDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: <Widget>[
          ConstrainedBox(
            constraints: BoxConstraints(
              minHeight: 200.0,
            ),
            child: Container(
              color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
            ),
          )
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class IconBadge extends StatelessWidget {
  final IconData icon;
  final double size;

  IconBadge(this.icon, {this.size = 32.0});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Icon(icon, size: size, color: Colors.white),
      width: size + 60,
      height: size + 60,
      color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),
    );
  }
}

item.title: Flutter基础学习——基础部件003
item.description:
基础部件

查看小部件的定义

Text：文字与文字样式

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class BasicDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: implement build
    return TextDemo();
  }
}

class TextDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  final TextStyle _textStyle = TextStyle(fontSize: 16.0);

  final String _author = 'CrazyAndy';
  final String _title = '早点口头语';

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: implement build
    return Text(
      '《$_title》 -- $_author 煎饼果子来一套',
      textAlign: TextAlign.left,
      style: _textStyle,
      maxLines: 3,
      overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
    );
  }
}

RichText：行内多样式的文字

class RichTextDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: implement build
    return RichText(
      text: TextSpan(
          text: 'CrazyAndy',
          style: TextStyle(
            color: Colors.deepPurpleAccent,
            fontSize: 34.0,
            fontStyle: FontStyle.italic,
            fontWeight: FontWeight.w100,
          ),
          children: [
            TextSpan(
                text: '.net',
                style: TextStyle(
                  fontSize: 17.0,
                  color: Colors.grey,
                ))
          ]),
    );
  }
}

容器与装饰

Container：容器

class ContainerDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: <Widget>[
          Row(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
            children: <Widget>[
              Container(
                color: Colors.grey[100], //背景颜色
                child: Row(
                  //row 里面可以添加一组横排显示的部件
                  children: <Widget>[
                    Container(
                      child: Icon(Icons.pool, size: 32.0, color: Colors.white),
                      color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0), //背景颜色,最后一个是不透明度
                      // padding: EdgeInsets.only(left: 24,right: 8),
                      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16.0), //内边距
                      margin: EdgeInsets.all(8.0), //外边距
                      width: 90.0,
                      height: 90.0,
                    )
                  ],
                ),
              )
            ],
          )
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

BoxDecoration：装饰盒子

我们装饰盒子 在 container中用 decoration属性

BoxDecoration：边框（border）

decoration: BoxDecoration(//装饰盒子
                        color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0),//如果这里设置了背景颜色，就要把Container里面的color属性给注释掉
                        border: Border(//边框设置
                          top: BorderSide(
                            color: Colors.indigoAccent[100],
                            width: 3.0,
                            style: BorderStyle.solid
                          )
                        )
                      ),

BoxDecoration：圆角（borderRadius）

BoxDecoration：阴影（borderShadow）

borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(26.0), //圆角效果
                          boxShadow: [
                            BoxShadow(
                              offset: Offset(
                                  6.0, 7.0), //控制阴影的偏移，第一个参数为x轴偏移量，第二个是y轴偏移量
                              color: Color.fromRGBO(
                                  16, 20, 188, 1.0), //默认阴影颜色是黑色，这里可以做修改
                              blurRadius: 1, //阴影的模糊程度，值越大，效果越明显
                              spreadRadius: 3.0, //正数是扩大阴影面积，负数是缩小
                            )
                          ]),

BoxDecoration：形状（shape）

BoxDecoration：渐变（gradient）

BoxDecoration：背景图像（image）

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class BasicDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: implement build
    return ContainerDemo();
  }
}

class ContainerDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
          image: DecorationImage(//这里设置背景图像
            image: NetworkImage('https://ss3.baidu.com/-fo3dSag_xI4khGko9WTAnF6hhy/image/h%3D300/sign=e8ce788890510fb367197197e933c893/b999a9014c086e061396097a0c087bf40ad1cbc0.jpg'),
            alignment: Alignment.topCenter,
            fit: BoxFit.cover, //扩充
        )),
      child: Column(
        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
        children: <Widget>[
          Row(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
            children: <Widget>[
              Container(
                color: Colors.grey[100], //背景颜色
                child: Row(
                  //row 里面可以添加一组横排显示的部件
                  children: <Widget>[
                    Container(
                      child: Icon(Icons.pool, size: 32.0, color: Colors.white),
                      // color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255, 1.0), //背景颜色,最后一个是不透明度
                      // padding: EdgeInsets.only(left: 24,right: 8),
                      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16.0), //内边距
                      margin: EdgeInsets.all(8.0), //外边距
                      width: 90.0,
                      height: 90.0,
                      decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        //装饰盒子
                        color: Color.fromRGBO(3, 54, 255,
                            1.0), //如果这里设置了背景颜色，就要把Container里面的color属性给注释掉
                        border: Border(//边框设置
                            // top: BorderSide(
                            //   color: Colors.indigoAccent[100],
                            //   width: 1.0,
                            //   style: BorderStyle.solid
                            // )
                            ),
                        // borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(26.0), //圆角效果
                        boxShadow: [
                          BoxShadow(
                            offset: Offset(
                                6.0, 7.0), //控制阴影的偏移，第一个参数为x轴偏移量，第二个是y轴偏移量
                            color: Color.fromRGBO(
                                16, 20, 188, 1.0), //默认阴影颜色是黑色，这里可以做修改
                            blurRadius: 1, //阴影的模糊程度，值越大，效果越明显
                            spreadRadius: 3.0, //正数是扩大阴影面积，负数是缩小
                          )
                        ],
                        shape: BoxShape
                            .circle, //如果这里使用圆形 形状，那么就不能使用 圆角效果，需要将上面 borderRadius给注释掉
                        // gradient: RadialGradient(//渐变效果，有三种，自己探究
                        //     colors: [
                        //   Color.fromRGBO(7, 102, 255, 1.0),
                        //   Color.fromRGBO(3, 28, 128, 1.0),
                        // ])
                      ),
                    )
                  ],
                ),
              )
            ],
          )
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class RichTextDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: implement build
    return RichText(
      text: TextSpan(
          text: 'CrazyAndy',
          style: TextStyle(
            color: Colors.deepPurpleAccent,
            fontSize: 34.0,
            fontStyle: FontStyle.italic,
            fontWeight: FontWeight.w100,
          ),
          children: [
            TextSpan(
                text: '.net',
                style: TextStyle(
                  fontSize: 17.0,
                  color: Colors.grey,
                ))
          ]),
    );
  }
}

class TextDemo extends StatelessWidget {
  final TextStyle _textStyle = TextStyle(fontSize: 16.0);

  final String _author = 'CrazyAndy';
  final String _title = '早点口头语';

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: implement build
    return Text(
      '《$_title》 -- $_author 煎饼果子来一套',
      textAlign: TextAlign.left,
      style: _textStyle,
      maxLines: 3,
      overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
    );
  }
}

item.title: Flutter基础学习——界面结构002
item.description:
标签栏

Material应用

以下代码我们将 listview内容单独抽出一个类来，然后再让main.dart去引用它

ListView_demo.dart代码如下

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import '../model/post.dart';

class ListViewDemo extends StatelessWidget{
  Widget _listItemBuilder(BuildContext context,int index) {
    return Container(
      color: Colors.white,
      margin: EdgeInsets.all(8.0),
      child: Column(
        children: <Widget>[
          Image.network(posts[index].imageUrl),
          SizedBox(height: 16.0,),
          Text(
            posts[index].title,
            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.title,
          ),
          Text(
            posts[index].author,
            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.subhead,
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 16.0,)
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
  
  @override
    Widget build(BuildContext context) {
      // TODO: implement build
      return ListView.builder(
          itemCount: posts.length,
          itemBuilder: _listItemBuilder,
        );
    }
}

main.dart代码如下

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'demo/ListView_demo.dart';


void main() => runApp(App());

class App extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MaterialApp(
      debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false, //去掉右上角debug显示标志
      home: Home(),
      theme: ThemeData(primarySwatch: Colors.yellow),
    );
  }
}

class Home extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: Colors.grey[100],
      appBar: AppBar(
        //顶部工具栏
        title: Text('CrazyAndy'),
        elevation: 30.0,
      ),
      body: ListViewDemo(),
    );
  }
}

AppBar:工具栏上的图标按钮(IconButton)

class Home extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: Colors.grey[100],
      appBar: AppBar(//AppBar一般放在Scaffold的appBar属性，用来设置顶部工具栏
        leading: IconButton(//图标按钮
          icon: Icon(Icons.menu),//图标
          tooltip: 'Navigation',
          onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Navigation button is pressed'),
        ),
        title: Text('CrazyAndy'),
        actions: <Widget>[
          IconButton(//图标按钮
            icon: Icon(Icons.search),//图标
            tooltip: 'Search',
            onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Search button is pressed'),
          )
        ],
        elevation: 30.0,
      ),
      body: null,
    );
  }
}

TabBar:用标签形式展示内容

tab叫做选项卡，也叫标签，在flutter应用上使用标签的形式展示内容，需要三样东西：TabBar(标签栏),TabView(标签视图),TabController(标签控制器，作用是控制按的那个标签，打开的哪个标签视图,它将标签栏和标签视图连接到一块，以下我们将使用默认控制器DefaultTabController).

class Home extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return DefaultTabController(
      length: 3,//设置标签数量
      child: Scaffold(
        backgroundColor: Colors.grey[100],
        appBar: AppBar(
          leading: IconButton(//图标按钮
            icon: Icon(Icons.menu),//图标
            tooltip: 'Navigation',
            onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Navigation button is pressed'),
          ),
          title: Text('CrazyAndy'),
          actions: <Widget>[
            IconButton(//图标按钮
              icon: Icon(Icons.search),//图标
              tooltip: 'Search',
              onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Search button is pressed'),
            )
          ],
          elevation: 30.0,
          bottom: TabBar(//我们可以在appbar的底部设置tabbar
            tabs: <Widget>[
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.local_florist),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.change_history),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.directions_bike),)
            ],
          ),
        ),
        body: TabBarView(//这里显示标签的视图
          children: <Widget>[
            Icon(Icons.local_florist,size: 128.0,color: Colors.black12,),
            Icon(Icons.change_history,size: 128.0,color: Colors.black12,),
            Icon(Icons.directions_bike,size: 128.0,color: Colors.black12,)
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

TabBar:自定义标签栏的样式

当前激活的标签的样式和未激活的会有区别。

bottom: TabBar(//我们可以在appbar的底部设置tabbar
            unselectedLabelColor: Colors.black38,//设置为选中标签栏颜色
            indicatorColor: Colors.black54,//设置当前激活标签栏底部的指示器显示线
            indicatorSize: TabBarIndicatorSize.label,//指示器显示线的长度和label一致
            indicatorWeight: 1.0,
            tabs: <Widget>[
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.local_florist),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.change_history),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.directions_bike),)
            ],
          )

Material:自定义按钮水波纹样式

点击按钮会有水波纹的效果，这个效果是material设计风格的一个标志，我们可以重新定制

class App extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MaterialApp(
      debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false, //去掉右上角debug显示标志
      home: Home(),
      theme: ThemeData(
        primarySwatch: Colors.yellow,
        highlightColor: Color.fromRGBO(255, 255, 255, 0.5),//高亮颜色,点击按钮立即显示的颜色
        splashColor: Colors.white70//水波纹颜色
      ),
    );
  }
}

抽屉

Drawer：抽屉(边栏)

和body对齐的位置添加drawer

drawer: Container(
          color: Colors.white,//背景颜色
          padding: EdgeInsets.all(8.0),//内边距
          child: Column(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,//主轴的对齐
            children: <Widget>[
              Text('this is drawer')
            ],
          ),
        ),

Drawer:在抽屉里使用ListView,DrawerHeader,ListTile

drawer: Drawer(//我们可以使用drawer这个widget来实现我们的抽屉
          child: ListView(
            padding: EdgeInsets.zero,
            children: <Widget>[
              DrawerHeader(
                child: Text('header'.toUpperCase()),//设置显示文字
                decoration: BoxDecoration(//设置背景颜色
                  color: Colors.grey[100]
                ),
              ),
              ListTile(
                title: Text('Message',textAlign: TextAlign.right,),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.message,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),//在标题后面设置内容用trailing,如果左边就用leading
              ),
              ListTile(
                title: Text('Favorite',textAlign: TextAlign.right,),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.favorite,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),
              ),
              ListTile(
                title: Text('Settings',textAlign: TextAlign.right,),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.settings,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),
              ),
            ],
          ),
        ),

Drawer:抽屉的打开与关闭

刚开始点击左上角的 三道杠 图标是不管用的，是因为我们在AppBar里面加入了leading 的代码，代码如下:

leading: IconButton(//图标按钮
            icon: Icon(Icons.menu),//图标
            tooltip: 'Navigation',
            onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Navigation button is pressed'),
          ),

只要去掉如上代码即可让应用自身实现 三道杠

如果我们想实现抽屉的关闭，我们可以在任意 组件的 点按事件添加如下代码，举例如下

ListTile(
                title: Text('Message',textAlign: TextAlign.right,),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.message,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),//在标题后面设置内容用trailing,如果左边就用leading
                onTap: ()=> Navigator.pop(context),
              ),

UserAccountDrawerHeader:抽屉里的用户账号信息

flutter 为app开发者做了个 专门显示 用户账户信息的小组件 ,实现代码如下

UserAccountsDrawerHeader(
                accountName: Text('CrazyAndy',style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),),
                accountEmail: Text('auden.sh@163.com'),
                currentAccountPicture: CircleAvatar(
                  backgroundImage: NetworkImage('https://imgsrc.baidu.com/baike/pic/item/3bf33a87e950352a4549c05a5f43fbf2b2118bbc.jpg'),
                ),
              ),

用户账户头部的背景图像

 UserAccountsDrawerHeader(
                accountName: Text('CrazyAndy',style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),),
                accountEmail: Text('auden.sh@163.com'),
                currentAccountPicture: CircleAvatar(
                  backgroundImage: NetworkImage('https://imgsrc.baidu.com/baike/pic/item/3bf33a87e950352a4549c05a5f43fbf2b2118bbc.jpg'),
                ),
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: Colors.blue[400],//背景颜色
                  image: DecorationImage(//背景图片
                    image: NetworkImage('http://pic.jinrishoufa.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/05/a2012059815.jpg'),
                    fit: BoxFit.cover,//自适应全局
                    colorFilter: ColorFilter.mode(//滤镜
                      Colors.white.withOpacity(0.1), 
                      BlendMode.hardLight)
                  )
                ),
              ),

创建DrawerDemo小部件

我们将 Drawr 所有代码封装到 一个dart文件里面，代码如下

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class DrawDemo extends StatelessWidget{
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Drawer(//我们可以使用drawer这个widget来实现我们的抽屉
          child: ListView(
            padding: EdgeInsets.zero,
            children: <Widget>[
              // DrawerHeader(
              //   child: Text('header'.toUpperCase()),//设置显示文字
              //   decoration: BoxDecoration(//设置背景颜色
              //     color: Colors.grey[100]
              //   ),
              // ),
              UserAccountsDrawerHeader(
                accountName: Text('CrazyAndy',style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),),
                accountEmail: Text('auden.sh@163.com'),
                currentAccountPicture: CircleAvatar(
                  backgroundImage: NetworkImage('https://imgsrc.baidu.com/baike/pic/item/3bf33a87e950352a4549c05a5f43fbf2b2118bbc.jpg'),
                ),
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: Colors.blue[400],//背景颜色
                  image: DecorationImage(//背景图片
                    image: NetworkImage('http://pic.jinrishoufa.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/05/a2012059815.jpg'),
                    fit: BoxFit.cover,//自适应全局
                    colorFilter: ColorFilter.mode(//滤镜
                      Colors.white.withOpacity(0.1), 
                      BlendMode.hardLight)
                  )
                ),
              ),
              ListTile(
                title: Text('Message',textAlign: TextAlign.right,),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.message,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),//在标题后面设置内容用trailing,如果左边就用leading
                onTap: ()=> Navigator.pop(context),
              ),
              ListTile(
                title: Text('Favorite',textAlign: TextAlign.right,),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.favorite,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),
              ),
              ListTile(
                title: Text('Settings',textAlign: TextAlign.right,),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.settings,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),
              ),
            ],
          ),
        );
  }
}

底部导航栏

BottomNavigationBar:底部导航栏

bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBar(
          type: BottomNavigationBarType.fixed,//项目4个以上就要用到它
          fixedColor: Colors.black,//激活颜色
          items: [
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.explore),
              title: Text('explore')
            ),
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.history),
              title: Text('history')
            ),
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.list),
              title: Text('list')
            ),
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.person),
              title: Text('person')
            )
          ],
        ),

BottomNavigationBar:底部导航栏的激活状态

和下一小节代码一块，我们将 bottomNavigationBar:里面的内容放到单独文件

StatefulWidget:有状态的小部件

修改索引值需要使用 StatefulWidget 的 setState 方法

新创建的 bottom_navigation_bar_demo.dar代码如下

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class BottomNavigationBarDemo extends StatefulWidget{
  @override
    State<StatefulWidget> createState() {
      // TODO: implement createState
      return _BottomNavigationBarDemoState();
    }
}

class _BottomNavigationBarDemoState extends State<BottomNavigationBarDemo>{
  int _currentIndex = 0;
  void _onTapHandler(int index){
    setState((){
      _currentIndex = index;
    });
  }
  @override
    Widget build(BuildContext context) {
      // TODO: implement build
      return BottomNavigationBar(
          type: BottomNavigationBarType.fixed,//项目4个以上就要用到它
          fixedColor: Colors.black,//激活颜色
          currentIndex: _currentIndex,//设置激活项目的索引值
          onTap: _onTapHandler,//点击项目 会调用此方法
          items: [
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.explore),
              title: Text('explore')
            ),
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.history),
              title: Text('history')
            ),
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.list),
              title: Text('list')
            ),
            BottomNavigationBarItem(
              icon: Icon(Icons.person),
              title: Text('person')
            )
          ],
        );
    }

Main.dart代码如下

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'demo/ListView_demo.dart';
import 'demo/draw_demo.dart';
import 'demo/bottom_navigation_bar_demo.dart';


void main() => runApp(App());

class App extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MaterialApp(
      debugShowCheckedModeBanner: false, //去掉右上角debug显示标志
      home: Home(),
      theme: ThemeData(
        primarySwatch: Colors.deepPurple,//主题颜色
        highlightColor: Color.fromRGBO(255, 255, 255, 0.5),//高亮颜色,点击按钮立即显示的颜色
        splashColor: Colors.white70//水波纹颜色
      ),
    );
  }
}

class Home extends StatelessWidget {
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return DefaultTabController(
      length: 3,//设置标签数量
      child: Scaffold(
        backgroundColor: Colors.grey[100],
        appBar: AppBar(
          // leading: IconButton(//图标按钮
          //   icon: Icon(Icons.menu),//图标
          //   tooltip: 'Navigation',
          //   onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Navigation button is pressed'),
          // ),
          title: Text('CrazyAndy'),
          actions: <Widget>[
            IconButton(//图标按钮
              icon: Icon(Icons.search),//图标
              tooltip: 'Search',
              onPressed: ()=>debugPrint('Search button is pressed'),
            )
          ],
          elevation: 30.0,
          bottom: TabBar(//我们可以在appbar的底部设置tabbar
            unselectedLabelColor: Colors.black38,//设置为选中标签栏颜色
            indicatorColor: Colors.black54,//设置当前激活标签栏底部的指示器显示线
            indicatorSize: TabBarIndicatorSize.label,//指示器显示线的长度和label一致
            indicatorWeight: 1.0,
            tabs: <Widget>[
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.local_florist),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.change_history),),
              Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.directions_bike),)
            ],
          ),
        ),
        body: TabBarView(//这里显示标签的视图
          children: <Widget>[
            Icon(Icons.local_florist,size: 128.0,color: Colors.black12,),
            Icon(Icons.change_history,size: 128.0,color: Colors.black12,),
            Icon(Icons.directions_bike,size: 128.0,color: Colors.black12,)
          ],
        ),
        // drawer: Text('this is drawer'),//左边显示,如果右边显示则用endDrawer
        drawer: DrawDemo(),
        bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBarDemo(),
      ),
    );
  }
}

Drawer_demo.dart代码如下

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class DrawerDemo extends StatelessWidget{

      return Drawer(
            child: ListView(
              padding: EdgeInsets.all(0.0),

                // DrawerHeader(

                        'https://resources.ninghao.org/images/childhood-in-a-picture.jpg',                    
                      ),

                        Colors.yellow[400].withOpacity(0.6), 
                        BlendMode.hardLight) 
                    )
                  ),
                ),
                ListTile(
                  title: Text('Messages',textAlign:TextAlign.right),
                  trailing: Icon(Icons.message,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),
                  onTap: ()=>Navigator.pop(context),
                ),
                ListTile(
                  title: Text('Favorite',textAlign:TextAlign.right),
                  trailing: Icon(Icons.favorite,color:Colors.black12,size:22.0),
                  onTap: ()=>Navigator.pop(context),
                ),
                ListTile(
                  title: Text('Settings',textAlign:TextAlign.right),
